question.text: STT on the sale of option contracts (where option is sold/written) is:

answer.text: 0.0625% of the option premium, payable by the seller

explanation.text:
**The Logic:** STT on sale of options: - Rate: 0.0625% (6.25 paise per Rs. 100) - Payable on: the option premium amount (not the contract value) - Payable by: the seller of the option
This is different from the STT on exercise of options (0.125% on settlement/intrinsic value).
**The Trap:** Note the different bases: futures STT is on turnover/contract value, option sale STT is on premium, and option exercise STT is on settlement value. Different bases with different rates.
**Cross-Exam Context:** Distinguishing STT rates and bases across different derivative transactions is a key exam skill.
**Key Takeaway:** Option sale STT: 0.0625% on premium (seller pays). Option exercise: 0.125% on settlement price (buyer pays).
